data.name: Subject_DuplicateError
data.value: A subject with that name already exists.

data.name: Home_NoUpcomingSub
data.value: Add your first test to get started.

data.name: Study_Subtitle
data.value: Tell us how much time you have — we'll figure out the rest.

data.name: Study_CaughtUpSub
data.value: No upcoming tests — enjoy your free time.

data.name: Settings_SubjectInUseError
data.value: Cannot delete a subject that still has tests. Delete or reassign those tests first.

data.name: Settings_ExportSub
data.value: Download all your tests and grades, including past graded ones.

data.name: Settings_FeedbackSub
data.value: Report a bug or suggest an improvement.

data.name: Settings_DeleteAccountSub
data.value: Permanently removes your account and all test data.

data.name: Settings_DeleteConfirmOne
data.value: This will permanently delete your account, 1 test, and all custom subjects. This cannot be undone.

data.name: Settings_DeleteConfirmFmt
data.value: This will permanently delete your account, all {0} tests, and all custom subjects. This cannot be undone.

data.name: Feedback_Subtitle
data.value: Found a bug or have an idea? Let me know.

data.name: Feedback_MessagePlaceholder
data.value: Describe the bug or your idea…

data.name: Feedback_SubmitValidationError
data.value: Your feedback couldn't be submitted. Please check your message and try again.

data.name: Feedback_YourEmpty
data.value: You haven't submitted any feedback yet.

data.name: Landing_HeroEyebrow
data.value: Free for students · Built in Zürich

data.name: Landing_HeroSub
data.value: Five subjects, three tests next week, one free evening. WSIST scores every upcoming test — urgency, volume, how well you get it, where your grades stand — and tells you exactly where tonight goes.

data.name: Landing_HeroNoteRest
data.value: · no ads · your tests stay yours

data.name: Landing_Card1Because
data.value: you have low understanding, the test has very high volume, it's in 2 days.

data.name: Landing_Card2Because
data.value: medium understanding, high volume, your avg in French is 4.1.

data.name: Landing_Card3Because
data.value: average understanding, medium volume, it's in 9 days.

data.name: Landing_RubricSub
data.value: School grades you all year. WSIST turns the table — every upcoming test earns a priority score out of 40, built from four factors. No vibes, no guilt. Just arithmetic.

data.name: Landing_UrgencyDesc
data.value: Tomorrow beats next month. Days left set the clock.

data.name: Landing_UnderstandingDesc
data.value: The less it clicks, the higher it climbs.

data.name: Landing_GradePullDesc
data.value: Subjects where your average slips get a push.

data.name: Landing_PlaySub
data.value: These sliders feed the same scoring rules that run in production at app.wsist.ch. Move them and watch a test climb your list.

data.name: Landing_ResultFoot
data.value: Same maths as the production engine

data.name: Landing_Step1Desc
data.value: Title, subject, date, how big it is, how well you get it. Twenty seconds, once per test.

data.name: Landing_Step2Title
data.value: Say how much time you have.

data.name: Landing_Step2Desc
data.value: One input. “How many hours can you study today?” is the only question WSIST ever asks you back.

data.name: Landing_MockHours
data.value: How many hours can you study today?

data.name: Landing_Step3Title
data.value: Study the top of the list.

data.name: Landing_Step3Desc
data.value: Every test ranked out of 40, with the reasons spelled out — so you trust the order instead of second-guessing it.

data.name: Landing_Feat1Desc
data.value: Your averages on the dashboard, always current — so a slipping subject shows up before the report card does.

data.name: Landing_Feat2Desc
data.value: Add the subjects your school actually teaches. Wirtschaft, Werkstatt, whatever — WSIST doesn't care, it just scores.

data.name: Landing_Feat3Desc
data.value: Tap any card for its score breakdown. You always see why a test sits where it sits.

data.name: Landing_Feat4Desc
data.value: Nothing new to remember. Your school account works fine.

data.name: Landing_Feat5Desc
data.value: Your tests and grades are visible to you alone, and you can delete them anytime. No ads, ever.

data.name: Landing_Feat6Desc
data.value: A daily study briefing in Swiss German, plus an Android app. In the works between exam weeks.

data.name: Landing_ManifestoPre
data.value: Built between apprenticeship shifts and exam weeks — by a student who

data.name: Privacy_Sec1
data.value:
1. Who we are

WSIST ("What Should I Study Today") is a personal study planning application developed and operated by Tim Hug, based in Switzerland. This privacy policy explains what personal data we collect, how we use it, and what rights you have.

Contact: privacy@wsist.ch

data.name: Privacy_Sec2
data.value:
2. Data we collect

When you sign in with Google, we receive and store the following data from Google's OAuth service:

  • Email address — used to identify your account
  • Display name — shown in the application
  • Google user ID — used to link your Google account to your WSIST account

We also store data you create while using the application:

  • Test entries (title, subject, due date, volume, understanding level, grade)
  • Custom subjects you create
  • Your display name if you update it in settings
  • Your account creation timestamp

We do not collect location data, device identifiers, or any data beyond what is listed above.

data.name: Privacy_Sec3
data.value:
3. How we use your data

Your data is used solely to provide the WSIST service:

  • Authenticating you when you log in
  • Storing and displaying your test entries
  • Calculating study recommendations and priority scores
  • Showing your grade overview

We do not sell your data, share it with advertisers, or use it for any purpose other than providing the service.

data.name: Privacy_Sec4
data.value:
4. Legal basis for processing (GDPR / Swiss nDSG)

We process your personal data on the basis of contract performance (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR) — processing is necessary to provide the service you have requested. By creating an account and using WSIST, you enter into a contract with us for the provision of the application.

data.name: Privacy_Sec5
data.value:
5. Third-party services

Google OAuth: Login is handled via Google's OAuth 2.0 service. When you authenticate, Google shares your profile data with us as described in section 2. Google's own privacy policy applies to the authentication process: policies.google.com/privacy.

Cloudflare: The application is served behind Cloudflare's CDN and Tunnel. Cloudflare may process connection metadata (IP address, request headers) as part of its service. Cloudflare's privacy policy: cloudflare.com/privacypolicy.

data.name: Privacy_Sec6
data.value:
6. Data retention

Your data is retained for as long as you have an active account. You can delete your account and all associated data at any time via Settings → Delete account inside the app. You can also contact us at privacy@wsist.ch and we will delete it within 30 days.

data.name: Privacy_Sec7
data.value:
7. Your rights

Under the GDPR and Swiss nDSG, you have the following rights:

  • Access: You can request a copy of all personal data we hold about you.
  • Rectification: You can correct inaccurate data via the Settings page or by contacting us.
  • Erasure: You can request deletion of your account and all associated data.
  • Portability: You can request your data in a machine-readable format.
  • Objection: You can object to processing in certain circumstances.

To exercise any of these rights, contact us at privacy@wsist.ch. We will respond within 30 days.

data.name: Privacy_Sec8
data.value:
8. Cookies and sessions

WSIST uses a single authentication cookie (.AspNetCore.Cookies) to maintain your login session. This cookie is strictly necessary for the application to function and does not track you across other websites. No analytics, advertising, or third-party tracking cookies are used.

data.name: Privacy_Sec9
data.value:
9. Security

Your data is transmitted over HTTPS. Passwords are never stored — authentication is handled entirely by Google. Database access is restricted to the application only.

data.name: Privacy_Sec10
data.value:
10. Changes to this policy

If we make material changes to this policy, we will update the "last updated" date at the top of this page. Continued use of WSIST after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

data.name: Privacy_Sec11
data.value:
11. Contact

Questions about this privacy policy? Contact us at privacy@wsist.ch.

data.name: Terms_Sec1
data.value:
1. Acceptance of terms

By accessing or using WSIST ("What Should I Study Today") at app.wsist.ch, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Use. If you do not agree, do not use the service.

data.name: Terms_Sec2
data.value:
2. Description of service

WSIST is a personal study planning tool that helps students track upcoming tests, estimate their preparedness, and determine what to study on a given day. The service is provided free of charge for personal, non-commercial use.

data.name: Terms_Sec3
data.value:
3. Account and access

Access to WSIST requires a Google account. By signing in, you authorise WSIST to receive your name and email address from Google as described in our Privacy Policy. You are responsible for keeping your Google account secure.

One account per person. You may not share your account with others or create accounts on behalf of third parties.

data.name: Terms_Sec4
data.value:
4. Acceptable use

You agree not to:

  • Use WSIST for any unlawful purpose
  • Attempt to access other users' data
  • Attempt to reverse-engineer, disrupt, or overload the service
  • Use automated tools to scrape or extract data from the service

data.name: Terms_Sec5
data.value:
5. Your content

You own the data you enter into WSIST (test entries, subjects, grades). We do not claim any ownership over it. You grant us a limited licence to store and process it solely for the purpose of providing the service to you.

data.name: Terms_Sec6
data.value:
6. Service availability

WSIST is a personal project and is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis. We make no guarantees about uptime, data preservation, or continued availability. We may modify or discontinue the service at any time without notice.

data.name: Terms_Sec7
data.value:
7. Disclaimer of warranties

To the fullest extent permitted by law, WSIST is provided without warranties of any kind, express or implied. We do not warrant that the service will be error-free, uninterrupted, or that the study recommendations it produces will lead to any particular academic outcome.

data.name: Terms_Sec8
data.value:
8. Limitation of liability

To the fullest extent permitted by applicable law, Tim Hug and the WSIST project shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of or inability to use the service.

data.name: Terms_Sec9
data.value:
9. Changes to terms

We may update these terms at any time. The "last updated" date at the top of this page will reflect any changes. Continued use of WSIST after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

data.name: Terms_Sec10
data.value:
10. Governing law

These terms are governed by the laws of Switzerland, without regard to conflict of law principles. Any disputes arising from these terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of the Canton of Zurich, Switzerland.

data.name: Terms_Sec11
data.value:
11. Contact

Questions about these terms? Contact us at privacy@wsist.ch.

data.name: NotFound_Sub
data.value: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

data.name: Error_Sub
data.value: An unexpected error occurred. If this keeps happening, try logging out and back in.
